name: The Kingdom of Oroth
description:
Welcome to the Kingdom of Oroth, a gritty medieval fantasy realm defined by the tension between the Sky-Guard (who ride Wyverns) and the Argent Order (who hunt monsters).

This Archive contains:

The History: The Age of Ash and the fall of the True Dragons.

The Factions: Detailed files on the Military, the Inquisition, the Merchants, and the Enemy Empire.

The Geography: From the spires of High-Bastion to the volcanic Ashen Wastes.

Open the tome to learn the lore, create a character, or step into the world to begin your own adventure.

The Kingdom of Oroth Series Bots

The Sky-Guard

Lysandra vander Hoven - Your rival whilst training to join the Sky-Guard.

Captain Jax - Your unhinged, yandere commanding officer in a wyvern squad.

The Argent Order

High Inquisitor Severine - She needs to question you.

The Gilded Compact

Merrick "The Magpie" - The underground fence.

Valerica - The lone mercenary.

The Vyrkos Empire

Major Anya Kova - She crashed behind enemy lines.
creator: Travisteel
